Job_Title: BDMS IT Governance Specialist (One Year Contract Basis)
Company: Bangkok Dusit Medical Services Public Company Limited
Full_Description:
Responsibilities:

1.Develop and implement an IT governance framework that aligns with business goals

Design and implement comprehensive IT governance frameworks, policies, and guidelines for enterprise IT governance

Improve and streamline the IT governance framework to ensure that the IT governance remains relevant and aligned with a strategic direction shift, technological advancement, emerging IT risks, and regulatory changes

Identify IT risk management framework and monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of IT risk management 

Stay abreast with emerging IT risks and industry best practices to ensure proactive risk management

Drive the adoption and compliance of IT governance practices across the enterprise

2. Facilitate the IT governance activities across the BDMS network to ensure the successful development, implementation, and maintenance of IT governance

3. Foster enterprise-wide IT governance culture and changes to promote awareness of the importance of IT governance in the organization, accountability, and network collaboration

4. Monitor and assess the effectiveness of IT governance including policies and guidelines to ensure alignment with business goals, proactive risk management, and regulatory compliance

5. Stakeholder Collaboration

Facilitate BDMS network’s discussions to resolve IT governance-related issues and implement best practices

Communicate IT governance initiatives, progress, and challenges to stakeholders at all levels of the organization including changes in enterprise IT policies/guidelines and IT risk management framework

Provide regular updates to the IT governance committee including assessment results of IT governance effectiveness with prioritization and planning actions

Qualifications:

1. Bachelor’s degree or higher in Information Technology, Computer Science, Management Information Systems, Information Security, or a related field.

2. Minimum 5 - 7 years’ experience working within an Information Technology management or governance function, preferably in 2 years’ experience leading an IT and/or security governance program

3. Strong knowledge of IT governance standards and frameworks such as COBIT, ISO27001/27799, ITIL

4. Practical work experience in the implementation of IT policies and procedures

5. Proven experience in risk management and monitoring of IT risk and security controls to ensure compliance and business cyber-resilience

6. Professional Information Security certification such as CISM, CISSP, CISA, and CRISC is a plus

7. Strong knowledge and background in Information Technology

8. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

Working Protocol:

5 Days/ Week (Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM) with 3 Days Working On-site and 2 Days can be working from anywhere.

Tantatat Clinics is looking for a PMO (Project Management Officer) to support strategic initiatives and operational improvement across multiple clinic branches. This role will coordinate cross-functional projects, monitor progress, and ensure alignment between management strategy and operational execution.

The ideal candidate is highly organized, analytical, and able to manage multiple projects in a fast-paced healthcare environment.

Key Responsibilities

Support the planning and execution of strategic projects across clinic branches

Coordinate with departments such as Operations, Marketing, HR, and Finance to ensure project alignment

Monitor project timelines, milestones, and deliverables to ensure on-time completion

Prepare project reports, dashboards, and presentations for senior management

Identify project risks and recommend solutions to ensure project success

Standardize project management processes and documentation

Track project performance and operational improvement initiatives

Support leadership in driving business transformation and operational excellence

Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Management, Engineering, or related fields

3–5 years of experience in PMO, Project Management, Strategy, or Business Operations

Strong organizational and project coordination skills

Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, and project tracking tools

Role & Responsibilities 

Provide a all level of support within data center (Network Operation Centre: NOC) operations and ensuring that the systems run properly. 

Provide first level of fault recovery with Network Engineer team, System Engineer team.

Provide customer service for any data center issues (On-line and phone) and follow up issues as concerned. 

Perform scheduled data center preventive maintenance (24x7).

Assist Network/System Engineer on network equipment installation. 

Assist in data recovery and disaster management in case there is a security breach or lost data. 

Prepare backup for systems so that data is not lost if there is a problem with the system. 




Qualification  

Bachelor Degree or Higher in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Technology or related field. 

At least 0-3 years’ experience in data center operational support or related position. 

Understanding of how successful processing of data center jobs and processes impacts hospital business is preferable. 

Customer Service focus, team player and good communication skills. 

Initiative an innovative in IT system.

Company: Advanced Info Service Public Company Limited (AIS)
Full_Description:
Responsibilities

- Perform 24 x 7 (8-hour rotating shift , Shift A 07:00-15:00, Shift B 15:00-23:00, Shift C 23:00-07:00) monitoring and initial response to potentially-malicious or anomalous activity based on event data (log files and alerts) from a wide range of IT systems components both on-premises and on-cloud, including XDR, IPS, Firewall, Proxy, WAF, DDoS, SIEM and other sources.

- Perform initial triage on incoming cyber incidents and issue trouble tickets to Incident handling team.

- Provide assistance in resolving all cyber incident cases

- Produce daily, weekly and monthly reports for both internal and external (CSOC as a services)

- Monitor CSOC as a service and co-ordinate with customer in accordant with SLA.

- Develop playbook and report in order to support automation incident response process.




Qualification

- Bachelor’s degree or higher in computer science, information technology, Cyber Security or related field

- 1-3 years in security monitoring and incident management system

- Experience in operting and fine tuning security tools such as SIEM, IPS, WAF etc.

- Good understanding of cyber kill chain, various type of cyber attacks and their characteristics

Job Summary:


ควบคุมและพัฒนาระบบงาน SAP (Module HR) และระบบ Non-SAP ต่าง ๆ ของกลุ่มบริษัท IRPC ให้ทำงานได้อย่างเต็มประสิทธิภาพ รวดเร็ว และตอบโจทย์ความต้องการทางธุรกิจตามแผนงานที่กำหนด

Responsibilities:


วิเคราะห์และออกแบบระบบ: วางโครงสร้างระบบงานใหม่ๆ เพื่อเพิ่มความคล่องตัวในการทำงานของพนักงานทั่วทั้งองค์กร

ดูแลระบบ SAP & ABAP: กำหนดมาตรฐานการ Support ระบบ SAP และออกแบบรายละเอียดทางเทคนิค (Functional Specification) สำหรับการพัฒนาโปรแกรมด้วย ABAP
บริหารจัดการโครงการใหม่:
- เป็นตัวกลางเชื่อมโยงระหว่างทีม IT, ผู้ใช้งาน และ Outsource
- ควบคุมการทดสอบระบบ (Testing) และการเชื่อมต่อข้อมูลกับ SAP HR ให้ถูกต้องแม่นยำ
- คัดเลือก Software และ Vendor ที่เหมาะสม พร้อมควบคุมงานให้เสร็จตามกำหนด
- แก้ไขปัญหาและพัฒนาบุคลากร: วิเคราะห์ปัญหาเชิงลึกเพื่อวางแผนแก้ไขร่วมกับผู้บริหาร พร้อมจัดอบรมถ่ายทอดความรู้ด้านเทคโนโลยีใหม่ๆ ให้กับทีมงาน

สามารถวิเคราะห์และออกแบบ Functional Specification เพื่อส่งต่อให้ทีมพัฒนาโปรแกรม (ABAP) ได้
มีทักษะในการบริหารจัดการโครงการ (Project Management) การตรวจรับงาน และการบริหารจัดการ Vendor / Outsource
มีทักษะการแก้ไขปัญหา การสื่อสาร

IT Support / IT Administrator📍 Bangkok (Thonglor Area)

About the Company

MedConsult Clinic is a well-established international medical clinic located in the Thonglor area of Bangkok. Our clinic provides high-quality healthcare services to both Thai and international patients, including general practice consultations, health checkups, vaccinations, aesthetics, and specialized medical services.

As our clinic continues to grow, we are looking for a motivated IT Support / IT Administrator to help maintain and improve our internal IT systems, hardware, software, and digital platforms.

Key Responsibilities

• Provide day-to-day IT support for clinic staff and internal systems

• Install, configure, and maintain computers, printers, and networking equipment

• Troubleshoot hardware, software, and connectivity issues

• Manage and maintain clinic software systems and internal databases

• Assist with website editing and updates (WordPress / CMS platforms)

• Monitor system performance and ensure data security and backup procedures

• Coordinate with external IT vendors when necessary

• Support digital tools used in the clinic such as booking systems, email platforms, and CRM tools

• Maintain records of IT equipment, licenses, and software updates

Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or related field

• 1–3 years experience in IT Support, System Administration, or similar role

• Strong knowledge of computer hardware, networking, and troubleshooting

• Familiar with website editing (WordPress or CMS systems)

• Basic understanding of website hosting, domains, and website maintenance

• Knowledge of Windows systems, office networks, and basic security practices

• Ability to solve technical issues quickly and efficiently

• Good communication skills and ability to support non-technical staff

• Able to communicate in basic English

Preferred Skills (Advantage)

• Experience supporting medical clinics or small businesses

• Knowledge of HTML / CSS / basic web editing

• Experience with website builders (Elementor, WordPress)

• Familiarity with Google Workspace, cloud storage, and backups

What We Offer

• Competitive salary based on experience

• Friendly international working environment

• Opportunity to work with modern digital systems

• Convenient location in Thonglor, Bangkok

วันทำงาน : จันทร์-ศุกร์

วันหยุด : วันเสาร์, วันอาทิตย์

เวลาทำงาน : 09:00 - 18:00

เวลาทำงานอื่น ๆ : อาจจะมีเข้าออฟฟิศ หรือลงคลังสินค้าในวันเสาร์บ้าง

 

หน้าที่ความรับผิดชอบ

• Vendor Coordination: เป็นตัวกลางประสานงานหลักระหว่างทีมภายในและ Vendor เพื่อติดตามความคืบหน้าของโครงการให้เป็นไปตามแผน

• Workflow & Documentation: ออกแบบและจัดทำแผนผังขั้นตอนการทำงาน (Workflow/Flowchart), คู่มือการใช้งาน (User Manual) และเอกสารประกอบโครงการ (Project Artifacts)

• Log & Record Management: บันทึกและจัดเก็บ Log รายการแก้ไข (Change Logs), รายงานการประชุม (MOM) และประวัติการรับส่งมอบงานจาก Vendor อย่างเป็นระบบ

• User Acceptance Testing (UAT): ทำหน้าที่เป็นด่านหน้าในการตรวจสอบคุณภาพซอฟต์แวร์ (Quality Gate) เบื้องต้น ทดสอบระบบตาม Test Script ก่อนส่งให้ผู้ใช้งานจริงตรวจสอบ

• Issue Tracking: รวบรวมปัญหา (Bugs/Issues) จากการทดสอบ เพื่อสื่อสารและติดตามการแก้ไขจากทาง Vendor

 

คุณสมบัติผู้สมัคร

• วุฒิปริญญาตรี สาขาคอมพิวเตอร์ธุรกิจ, เทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ, การจัดการวิศวกรรม หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

• มีทักษะการสื่อสารที่ดีเยี่ยม (สำคัญมากสำหรับตำแหน่งประสานงาน)

• สามารถใช้เครื่องมือทำ Flowchart ได้ดี เช่น Microsoft Visio, Lucidchart หรือ Draw.io

• มีความเข้าใจพื้นฐานในวงจรการพัฒนาซอฟต์แวร์ (SDLC) และการทดสอบระบบ

• หากมีทักษะการใช้เครื่องมือบริหารโครงการ เช่น Jira, Trello หรือ Microsoft Project จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

• มีความละเอียดรอบคอบสูงในการจัดการงานเอกสารและตัวเลข

สวัสดิการ

ประกันสังคม + กองทุนสำรองเลี้ยงชีพ
วันหยุดประจำปีมากกว่า 13 วัน + พักร้อน + วันหยุดวันเกิด 🎂
เงินช่วยเหลือกรณีต่าง ๆ
ตรวจสุขภาพประจำปี
ส่วนลดซื้อสินค้า IT ราคาพนักงาน
งานเลี้ยงประจำปี 🎉

Job_Title: เจ้าหน้าที่ IT Support
Full_Description:
ตำแหน่งงาน: เจ้าหน้าที่ IT Support
ตำแหน่งเจ้าหน้าที่ IT Support มีความสำคัญอย่างมากต่อความสำเร็จของ J.I.B. Computer Group Co., Ltd. โดยจะเป็นผู้ให้การสนับสนุนด้านเทคนิค และแก้ไขปัญหาเกี่ยวกับระบบคอมพิวเตอร์และเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศให้กับพนักงานภายในบริษัท

หน้าที่หลัก:

ตั้งค่าสิทธิ์ของผู้ใช้ในแต่ล่ะระบบ

รับเรื่องคอยประสานงานปัญหาการใช้งานระบบ ระหว่างผู้ใช้และทีมพัฒนาโปรแกรม ที่ใช้งานทั้งหมดภายในบริษัท รวมถึงหน้าเว็บไซต์ของบริษัทและกิจกรรมต่างๆที่เกิดขึ้นในบริษัท

จัดทำเอกสารประกอบการใช้งานระบบภายในทีม

จัดทำรายการประชุมทีม

งานอื่นๆ ตามที่ได้รับมอบหมาย

ทักษะ คุณสมบัติ และประสบการณ์:

การศึกษาระดับปริญญาตรี สาขาไอที หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

มีความเข้าใจในการบริหารงานสารสนเทศ

มีความเข้าใจในระบบโครงสร้างพื้นฐานสารสนเทศและแนวทางการพัฒนาระบบ

มีความเข้าใจในกฏหมายสารสนเทศและแนวทางปฏิบัติ

ยินดีรับนักศึกษาจบใหม่




สวัสดิการ

1. ค่าคอมมิชชั่น(บางตำแหน่ง)
2. ประกันสังคม
3. ประกันอุบัติเหตุ
4. ชุดยูนิฟอร์ม
5. วันหยุดพักร้อน 
6. วันหยุดนักขัตฤกษ์
7. ปรับเงินประจำปี
8. กิจกรรม งานเลี้ยงสังสรรค์
9.กองทุนสำรองเลี้ยงชีพ
10.เงินช่วยเหลือกรณีต่างๆเช่น(มงคลสมรส/คลอดบุตร/อุปสมบท/ฌาปนกิจ)
11.การอบรมพนักงานตามหลักสูตรต่างๆ
12.ค่าเดินทางและเบี้ยเลี้ยง(กรณีเดินทาางไปปฏิบัติงานนอกสถานที่)

วิธีการสมัคร

สนใจสมัครงานออนไลน์ , e-mail หรือ ติดต่อที่สาขานั้นๆโดยตรง
ติดต่อขอรับเอกสารการสมัครงานได้ที่สำนักงานใหญ่ 
บริษัท เจ.ไอ.บี. คอมพิวเตอร์ กรุ๊ป จำกัด เลขที่ 21 ถนนพหลโยธิน แขวงสนามบิน เขตดอนเมือง กรุงเทพมหานคร  12120

--เอกสารประกอบการสมัคร--
1. รูปถ่ายหน้าตรง
2. สำเนาบัตรประจำตัวประชาชน
3. สำเนาทะเบียนบ้าน
4. เอกสารรับรองการศึกษา

ติดต่อสอบถาม 090-651-0035, 082-486-3715 ฝ่ายทรัพยากรบุคคล

_________


As a member of the EY Consulting team, you will work directly with Business Consulting, Technology Consulting and Risk Consulting teams and clients on a daily basis to plan, design, deliver and deploy solutions for our clients.

Your key responsibilities:

Gather information from clients by interview, conducting workshops, surveys or focus groups, etc.
Identify gaps in client operations and recommend resolutions for further improvements
Prepare and design deliverables content to reflect client needs and strive to develop deliverable quality through verification and validation of results
Manage a small workstream of consultants through task delegations, guidance and coaching, and quality assurance
Work closely with the client in collecting client's information and managing their expectation
Able to work in different business and/or project’s scope, or provide operational supports to the team from time to time


To qualify for the role you must have:

Currently 3rd or 4th year students in Business Administration, Accounting, Finance, Economics, Engineering or other related fields
Strong analytical thinking with exceptional organizational skills
Available to intern full time (5 days / week) at least 2 months and students in Cooperative Program

วัตถุประสงค์ (Job Purpose)

1. ร่วมกับผู้บังคับบัญชาวางแผน ออกแบบ และพัฒนาระบบการทางานอัตโนมัติ (Workflow Automation) เพื่อทาให้ทุกระบบงานสามารถเชื่อมต่อและทางานร่วมกันได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ และมีความถูกต้องแม่นยา เชื่อถือได้

2.พัฒนาระบบอัตโนมัติโดยใช้เครื่องมือ Low-code/No-code หรือ RPA เขียนโปรแกรม ทดสอบ และส่งมอบงานให้เป็นไปตามความต้องการของระบบงานนั้นๆ อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ

3.วิเคราะห์ทบทวนระบบงานเพื่อนาไปปรับปรุง แก้ไข และพัฒนากระบวนการทางานอัตโนมัติให้ดีและมีประสิทธิภาพมากขึ้น เพื่อลดภาระงานซ้าซ้อนและเพิ่มความเร็วในการบริการ

หน้าที่หลัก/กิจกรรมหลัก (Key responsibilities and Activities)

รับผิดชอบงานด้านวิศวกรรมกระบวนการอัตโนมัติ (Automation Engineering) ออกแบบและพัฒนาระบบนิเวศการทางานอัตโนมัติ (Automation Ecosystem) โดยใช้ n8n หรือ RPA เพื่อเชื่อมต่อข้อมูลระหว่างระบบ (Data Interface) ตามนโยบายความปลอดภัย

ดาเนินการจัดระเบียบข้อมูลจาก API หรือฐานข้อมูล แล้วนาข้อมูลมาทาความสะอาดและแปลงรูปแบบ (Data Cleansing + Shaping + ETL) ภายใน Workflow เพื่อส่งต่อข้อมูลไปยังระบบเป้าหมายได้อย่างถูกต้อง

รวบรวมและเชื่อมต่อข้อมูลจากแพลตฟอร์มต่างๆ ทั้ง Structured และ Unstructured Data ผ่าน API (RESTful) วิเคราะห์และวางแผนการเรียกใช้ข้อมูลอัตโนมัติให้สอดคล้องกับ Business Flow

ติดตาม และซ่อมบารุงระบบ Workflow และ Automation Pipeline พัฒนาคุณภาพและประสิทธิภาพการทางาน (Performance Tuning) ให้มีเสถียรภาพและเป็นไปตามมาตรฐานเดียวกัน

วิเคราะห์กระบวนการทางธุรกิจที่ซับซ้อน เพื่อนามาปรับปรุงเป็นระบบอัตโนมัติ เพิ่มคุณภาพของผลลัพธ์ และสร้างความน่าเชื่อถือให้กับขั้นตอนการทางาน

พัฒนา Automation ตามคาขอ (Automation Request) จากส่วนงานต่างๆ และให้คาปรึกษาแก่บุคลากรในการใช้งานเครื่องมืออัตโนมัติ

เตรียมเอกสาร System Architecture และจัดทาขั้นตอนการปฏิบัติงาน (SOP) ให้เป็นมาตรฐาน สามารถปฏิบัติได้จริง และพร้อมให้การตรวจสอบ

จัดทาสรุปหรือรายงานผลการดาเนินการของระบบอัตโนมัติ (เช่น Success/Fail Rate) ให้กับผู้บังคับบัญชา

จัดทาคู่มือและฝึกอบรมให้กับพนักงานที่ต้องการใช้งานระบบอัตโนมัติหรือ Dashboard ต่างๆ ขององค์กร

จัดเตรียมข้อมูลและเอกสารต่างๆ ตามผู้ตรวจสอบร้องขอ พร้อมทั้งให้รายละเอียดทางเทคนิคที่เกี่ยวข้องกับระบบ Automation

งานอื่นๆ ตามที่ได้รับมอบหมายจากผู้บังคับบัญชา

คุณสมบัติประจำตำแหน่ง (Job Specifications)

วุฒิการศึกษาปริญญาตรีขึ้นไป สาขาเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ วิศวกรรมคอมพิวเตอร์ หรือที่เกี่ยวข้อง

ผ่านงานด้านการออกแบบและพัฒนาระบบ Workflow Automation (เช่น n8n, Zapier) หรือ RPA ไม่ต่ากว่า 3-5 ปี

มีประสบการณ์ในการแก้ไขปัญหากระบวนการทางานที่ซับซ้อน และการจัดการเชื่อมต่อระบบ (System Integration) ทั้งแบบ On-Premise และ On-Cloud

สามารถวิเคราะห์ความสัมพันธ์ของข้อมูลและนามาประยุกต์ใช้กับกระบวนการทางธุรกิจได้

เรียนรู้และเข้าใจเทคโนโลยี Automation ใหม่ๆ ที่เกี่ยวข้องได้เร็ว

สามารถทางานเป็นทีมและมีมนุษยสัมพันธ์ที่ดี ประสานงานระหว่างฝ่าย IT และฝ่ายธุรกิจได้

มีความรับผิดชอบสูง และละเอียดรอบคอบในการตั้งค่าระบบที่มีผลต่อข้อมูลธุรกรรม

Infrastructure & Support Specialist

Company: UBIS (Asia) Public Company Limited
Job Level: Specialist (L3 – L5)
Report to: Infrastructure & Support (Supervisor – Division)
Location: Samut Sakhon Plant (Primary Base) with regular travel to Head Office – TRR Tower, Bangkok to support users (transportation support provided)
Industry: Niche Chemical Manufacturing

About the Role

UBIS is strengthening its IT infrastructure and digital capability to support stable, secure, and sustainable business operations. We are seeking a capable and service-minded Infrastructure & Support (Specialist) to manage and support our IT infrastructure and systems across Head Office and Plant operations.

This role plays a critical part in ensuring system availability, cybersecurity readiness, and high-quality IT services, while supporting compliance with Information Security policies, PDPA, and IT governance standards.

Key Responsibilities

1. IT Infrastructure & System Operations

Manage and maintain IT infrastructure including Network, Firewall, Switch, Wireless, Server, Storage, CCTV, and cybersecurity systems.

Monitor system performance, availability, and security to ensure stable and continuous operations.

Perform troubleshooting and corrective actions to minimize downtime and operational risks.

Plan and execute preventive maintenance (PM) for infrastructure systems and equipment.

2. IT Support & Service Management

Provide technical support for hardware, software, network, and system issues in accordance with IT Service Management processes.

Handle Incident and Service Request tickets and ensure resolution within defined SLA.

Provide guidance and basic training to internal users for proper system and IT equipment usage.

Maintain accurate records of Incidents and Service Requests for service improvement and root cause analysis.

3. Cybersecurity & Compliance

Monitor IT and security logs (Firewall, System, Network traffic) to detect abnormal activities and potential security threats.

Support implementation of Cybersecurity and Information Security policies in line with company standards and PDPA requirements.

Participate in IT audits and security assessments and support corrective action plans.

4. Process Improvement & Documentation

Continuously improve IT infrastructure processes to enhance service quality and operational efficiency.

Prepare and maintain technical documentation including Network Diagrams, Asset Inventory, and Maintenance Logs.

Ensure documentation is accurate, up to date, and auditable.

5. Vendor Coordination

Coordinate with external vendors and contractors to ensure service delivery in accordance with contracts and SLA.

Monitor vendor performance and support issue resolution related to infrastructure and system services.

Qualifications

Bachelor’s Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or related fields.

At least 1–3 years of experience in Infrastructure, Network, or IT Support roles.

Basic to intermediate knowledge of Network, Server, Hardware, and IT Support.

Knowledge of Cybersecurity, PDPA, or IT Security standards is an advantage.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Good communication skills with a service-oriented mindset.

Ability to drive both car and motorcycle.

Why Join UBIS?

Be part of a growing organization strengthening its digital and IT foundation.

Gain hands-on experience in IT infrastructure, cybersecurity, and enterprise systems.

Work closely with cross-functional teams and plant operations in a real industrial environment.

Clear development path toward Infrastructure Engineer, System Engineer, or IT Security roles.

Contribute directly to business continuity and operational excellence.

Job Description
1. Be responsible for project tasks related to statistical data analysis.
2. Be responsible for project tasks related to database management (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle).
3. Perform statistical data analysis using tools such as SAS, SPSS, or programming languages such as Python and R.
4. Be responsible for data cleansing processes (ETL/ELT).
5. Prepare and analyze data to support project operations as assigned.
6. Prepare reports related to statistical analysis within the project as assigned.
7. Assist in coordinating project activities related to statistical analysis as assigned.
8. General administrative and other related tasks
- All staff within the department/division are expected to support one another, collaborate effectively, share information, and perform assigned duties as required.

Job Specification
- Fresh graduates and candidates with no prior experience are welcome
- Degree in Statistics, Data Science, Computer Science, or a related field
- Others: Knowledge or experience in Business Intelligence (BI) tools such as Power BI, Tableau, or Google Data Studio will be an advantage

Working with a team of expert operations and developers to create model

Monitoring both Thai and world markets for any changes and analyze the trade to adjust Robot Algorithm Trade

Monitor trading systems in real-time and adjust trading parameters to maximize profitability

Analyze our historical data and implement trading system efficiency improvements

Researching and digging deep into details to work out the trading/market making strategies with a focus on providing value to market participants




Qualifications & experience

Bachelor's Degree in Engineering and Technologies. Other fields are welcome if can related.

Welcome all years who interested in Trading and cryptocurrency.

Curious, proactive learner with strong research and communication skills

Available for minimum of 3-months internship program (Co-op is subjected to agreement with your university)

ออกแบบระบบ Smart Home / IoT ให้เหมาะสมกับการใช้งานจริงของลูกค้า (เช่น ระบบไฟอัจฉริยะ, กล้องวงจรปิด, Digital Door Lock, ระบบเซ็นเซอร์, ระบบปรับอากาศอัจฉริยะ ฯลฯ)

ประเมินราคางานติดตั้ง จัดทำ BOQ (Bill of Quantity) และเอกสารเสนอราคา

ติดตั้งและตั้งค่าอุปกรณ์ IoT และ Smart Home ให้ทำงานได้ตามมาตรฐาน และตรงตามความต้องการของลูกค้า

ตรวจสอบและเชื่อมต่อระบบ ไฟฟ้าอาคาร และ Network (Wi-Fi, Router, Gateway, Protocol เช่น Zigbee, Z-Wave, Bluetooth, Thread) เข้ากับอุปกรณ์ IoT

ศึกษาและทำความเข้าใจ สินค้า IoT และ Smart Home เพื่อสามารถนำเสนอและ ประยุกต์ใช้งานให้ตรงตามโจทย์ของลูกค้า

เรียนรู้อุปกรณ์ IoT และเทคโนโลยีใหม่ ๆ ได้อย่างรวดเร็ว และนำมาประยุกต์ใช้งานได้จริง

อ่านและจัดทำ แบบงานติดตั้ง (Installation Drawing/Diagram) ได้

ใช้และดูแล เครื่องมือและอุปกรณ์ที่จำเป็นสำหรับงานติดตั้ง อย่างถูกต้องและปลอดภัย

วิเคราะห์และแก้ไขปัญหาที่เกิดขึ้นทั้งด้าน Hardware และ Software

Job_Title: IT Support (โรงพยาบาลกรุงเทพ)
Full_Description:
Responsibilities:

-Performs problem solving and assistance on various software applications and hardware systems for internal staff and Managerial staff of BDMS Group. 

-Performs routine hardware and software maintenance and assists in proper upkeep and utilization of systems. 

-Provides technical assistance and maintenance support to customer’s end users. 

-Documents projects and writes user instructions. 

-Maintains knowledge of current technological developments/trends in area of expertise. 

-Monitors external data sources to ensure receipt and analysis of all charges. 

-Performs miscellaneous job-related duties as assigned. 

-May provide individual and/or group instruction and training to customer’s staff and/or end users on computer hardware and software. 




Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Business Computer , Computer Science or related fields.

Minimum 2-6 years’ experience in IT Support.

Knowledge of M365 in technical and application support in hospital flow will be the advantage.

Good Communication, Interpersonal, Possess service minded and problem solving skills.

Quick learner, high responsibility, self-motivated, excellent team spirit and willing to work hard.




Operations Time:  5 Days work in shifts , 2 Days off

Location:  On-site 100% at Bangkok Hospital (Headquarters) Soi Soonvijai 7, New Petchburi Road, Huaykwang, Bangkok,.

Aware Outsourcing Services (AOS)’s Overview

Aware is regarded as a leader in outsourced IT services, assisting the largest telecoms, banking, and technology firms in Thailand.

The IT Assistant Manager will provides support and coordination for the development and improvement of the organization’s IT systems in the Hospital areas.

Employment type: Contract, Full Time

Work Condition: Onsite client 100%


Job Description:

Support, plan, and coordinate IT system development and improvement projects to align with business goals

Act as the key liaison between users, internal IT teams, and external vendors/suppliers to ensure smooth project execution

Manage and oversee multiple IT projects, including both Application and Infrastructure, ensuring timelines, scope, and quality are met

Gather and analyze business and system requirements to propose effective IT solutions

Design and plan system testing (UAT, SIT) to ensure reliability, performance, and accuracy before deployment

Monitor system performance, identify issues, and lead troubleshooting and problem resolution processes

Drive system enhancements, upgrades, or new implementations to improve operational efficiency

Prepare project documentation, reports, and progress updates for stakeholders and management

Ensure IT processes, policies, and security standards are followed and maintained

Provide support and guidance to users, including training when necessary




Qualifications & Requirements:

Bachelor’s degree or higher in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field

4–6 years of experience in IT, system implementation, or IT project coordination

Strong understanding of both Application systems and IT Infrastructure

Familiar with hospital IT systems and healthcare system

Experience in IT project management, with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills

Strong analytical, problem-solving, and decision-making abilities

Experience working with external vendors or suppliers

Knowledge of system testing processes (UAT, SIT) and SDLC is preferred

Familiarity with ERP, CRM, or enterprise systems is an advantage

Basic knowledge of Network, Server, Cloud, or Cybersecurity is a plus

Excellent business communication and stakeholder management skills

Thai native-level communication with good command of English




Benefits & Welfare as AOS’s Contractor:

·        Social Security Fund

·        Group Health Medical Insurance

·        Life insurance

·        Annual leave (1 day/month, 12 days/year)

·        Sick leave 30 days/year (with or without medical certificate, per labor law)

·        Business leaves 3 days/year, Bereavement leave

·        Onboarding gifts: Polo shirt and T-shirt

·        Birthday gift

·        Work anniversary gift

·        New Year party

·        Annual company trip

·        Internal training

·        Company Laptop




Aware Outsourcing Services Corporation (Thailand) Co., Ltd. (AOS) / Aware Group

Ready to say goodbye to the boring, traditional 9-5 routine and embrace a dynamic and exciting work environment that puts you in control? This position offers you the flexibility to set your own schedule and complete exciting tasks using an innovative web-based evaluation tool.     


A Day in the Life of a Media Search Analyst:    

In this role, you will be doing a comprehensive assessment of diverse task categories, encompassing music, video, Books, Podcasts and home pod evaluations spanning various media domains    

Analyzing and evaluating search outcomes for App Store Content and conducting research using online tools to assess and validate query accuracy and intent by applying market expertise in conjunction with provided directives to evaluate the relevance and purpose of task-related information for your specific market.    




Join us today and be a key player in our community revolutionizing digital media content!    




Qualification path    

No previous professional experience is required to apply to this role, however, working on this project will require you to pass the basic requirements and go through a standard assessment process. This is a part-time long-term project and your work will be subject to our standard quality assurance checks during the term of this agreement.     


Basic Requirements    

Speaker of the English & Thai language, with fluency in both written and spoken forms    

Being a resident in Thailand for the last 12 months and having familiarity with current and historical business, media, sport, news, social media, and cultural affairs in Thailand    

Having an email address associated with an Apple ID and experience and know-how of Apple products    

Up-to-date familiarity with prevailing trends in applications, music & video with a keen interest in internet research    

Flexibility to work across a diverse set of task types, including news, audio tasks, and relevance    

Daily access to a secure broadband internet connection, computer, and relevant software    

Independent working and the ability to adapt to innovative methodologies and processes with great attention to detail and exceptional communication skills    

While a High School degree or higher certification is preferred, we are open to candidates with exceptional skills and talent.    

Additional Incentives provided throughout the assessment process   


Assessment

In order to be hired into the program, you’ll take an open book qualification exam that will determine your suitability for the position and complete ID verification. Our team will provide you with guidelines and learning materials before your qualification exam. You will be required to complete the exam in a specific timeframe but at your convenience.




Equal Opportunity

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for a contractual relationship without regard to race, color, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or protected veteran status. At TELUS International AI, we are proud to offer equal opportunities and are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive community. All aspects of selection are based on applicants’ qualifications, merits, competence, and performance without regard to any characteristic related to diversity.

About the role

We are seeking a skilled Database Administrator to join our growing team at Cal-Comp Electronics (Thailand) Public Company Limited. As a Database Administrator, you will play a crucial role in managing and maintaining the company's critical database systems, ensuring their reliability, security, and optimal performance. This full-time position is based in Samut Sakhon.

What you'll be doing

Design, implement, and maintain database systems to support business operations

Monitor database performance and optimize system efficiency

Perform database backup, recovery, and ensure data integrity

Manage database security, access control, and system reliability

Support troubleshooting and resolve database-related issues

Collaborate with internal teams to support system and data requirements

Maintain database documentation and follow best practices

What we're looking for

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or related field

Experience in database administration or related IT roles

Knowledge of database systems such as Oracle or other relational databases

Familiar with Linux / Unix / Windows Server environments

Understanding of database backup, recovery, and security concepts

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

Ability to work independently and as part of a team

Basic communication skills in English

If you are passionate about database management and are ready to contribute to the success of our organisation, we encourage you to apply now.

Greenmoons ก่อตั้งในปี 2022 โดยเริ่มจากการเป็นบริษัทสตาร์ทอัพด้านเทคโนโลยีที่เกิดจากประสบการณ์ที่สั่งสมมานานนับสิบปี เราเริ่มจากการเป็นทีมงานเล็ก ๆ ที่หลงใหลและมือหนึ่งในด้านเทคโนโลยีระดับประเทศ พวกเรานำความสามารถและวิสัยทัศน์ร่วมกันเพื่อสร้างนวัตกรรมที่จะช่วยให้คู่ค้าและลูกค้าของเราฝ่าฝันความท้าทายในโลกดิจิตัลไปได้ เรา มองเทคโนโลยีคือพลังสู่การเปลี่ยนแปลง เรามุ่งมั่นสร้างอะไรใหม่ ๆ พัฒนาไปพร้อมกับคู่ค้าและลูกค้า  และคอยให้คำปรึกษาเพื่อเอาชนะความท้าทายไปด้วยกัน 

ชื่อ Greenmoons เองก็สื่อถึงพันธกิจหลักของเรา คือส่งเสริมการเติบโตและความก้าวหน้าด้วยนวัตกรรม Green (สีเขียว) ของแบรนด์หมายถึงความทุ่มเทที่มั่นคงเพื่อให้บริษัทของคู่ค้าและลูกค้าประสบความสำเร็จอย่างสูงสุดและยั่งยืน  Moons (พระจันทร์) แทนความเป็นไปได้อันไรขีดจำกัด

เราคือบริษัทที่ก่อตั้งโดยคนไทย เราทุ่มเทเพื่อนำความเปลี่ยนแปลงธุรกิจทุกขนาดในทุกภาคส่วนสู่ระบบดิจิทัล ตั้งแต่ ERP software จนถึง Robotic Process Automation (RPA), AI Automation, E-commerce solutions, Web & Super App Development, และ Educational Technology 

ลักษณะงาน

ผลิตโซลูชันการออกแบบ UX คุณภาพสูงผ่านโครงร่าง การออกแบบภาพและกราฟิก ไดอะแกรมโฟลว์ แผนผังไซต์ และต้นแบบ
ผสมผสานความคิดเห็นของลูกค้าและการค้นพบการใช้งานเข้ากับการออกแบบเพื่อปรับปรุงประสบการณ์ผู้ใช้
การระบุและแก้ไขปัญหา UX
ทํางานร่วมกันอย่างมีประสิทธิภาพกับทีมนักออกแบบนักพัฒนาและผู้บริหาร
ทํางานในหลายโครงการด้วยความสามารถในการจัดลําดับความสําคัญของงาน
พัฒนาแบบจําลองและต้นแบบที่แสดงให้เห็นอย่างชัดเจนว่าไซต์ทํางานอย่างไรและมีลักษณะอย่างไร

คุณสมบัติ

ประสบการณ์ 3+ ปีที่ได้รับการพิสูจน์แล้วในฐานะนักออกแบบ UX/UI
มีประสบการณ์ในการออกแบบ UX/UI สําหรับแอปพลิเคชันมือถือและเว็บ
มีประสบการณ์ในหนึ่งในเครื่องมือออกแบบ ตัวอย่างเช่น Figma, Adobe XD หรือ Sketch
ความเข้าใจในกระบวนการออกแบบ ระบบการออกแบบ และเว็บไซต์ที่ตอบสนอง
กระตือรือร้นที่จะเรียนรู้เพิ่มเติมเกี่ยวกับเทคโนโลยีใหม่และแนวโน้ม UX/UI
ผู้เล่นในทีม แต่สามารถทํางานได้อย่างอิสระเช่นกัน
มีทัศนคติและพฤติกรรมที่ดีในการทํางาน

Job_Title: Assistant Operation Manager (Customer Service) - English speaking
Full_Description:
Qualifications

Requirements:

Bachelor’s degree or equivalent diploma
Dynamic leader with experience and passion for managing large and diverse teams across multiple workflows in a fast-paced environment, able to deal with rapid change and ambiguity
Minimum 2+ years' of people management experience as a Sr Manager in Fraud and Risk Operations in Payment System that includes Fraud chargebacks, Customer Complaints and Escalations too.
Strategic thinker with strong analytical and problem-solving skills
10+ years of experience in operations, preferably in BPO/ITES industry
7+ years of people management experience, including managing managers, and a strong desire to develop team members
Empathy for the Social community platform users and passion to create an exceptional user experience and provide outstanding support
Excited to be part of a global operations teams, design effective business operations, tackle complex problems, and develop individual team members
Adaptable and energized by a fast-paced environment; Significant experience in a complex fast paced environment
Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Preferred Requirements:  

Having high cultural awareness of political and social situations is a plus!
Proficiency in English 
Build a positive relation with Client in order to create new business opportunities
Identify potential risks and opportunities of improvement in the process and suggest solutions

Responsibilities

Manage the overall performance and governance of the Statements of Work (together with Vendor Account Management / Business Development). Manage the day-to-day operations in accordance with requirements and SLAs set out in SOW. Prompt identification and resolution of Service delivery issues including implementation of preventative measures. Transition management during set up phase or expansion phases.
Establish the Vendor infrastructure necessary to perform the Services, including all technology, financial, human resources, security, facilities and communication resources. Install all Service delivery processes and Service Level reporting mechanisms.
Provide exceptional people management, mentorship and career development to members of the team, including Managers, TLs, and Agents, achieve low attrition levels and high employee engagement. Flag and escalate business risks timely to the Client and Stake holders.
Lead the group of Managers and drive process deliveries and process excellence through consistent monitoring and critical inputs.
Ability to Deep Dive on customer complaints and appeal cases received from business line including user appeal document, user analysis and trend analysis.
Ability to Deep Dive on completed transactions that being flagged with high-risk flag for post manual review to evaluate if is a potential fraud, and instantly share fraud trend to fraud strategy team. Strictly following chargeback operation standard SOP and requirement to handle representment case.
Ability to guide the team on completing the chargeback cases within SLA/Pre-set time given, ensuring all the representment documents are gathered correctly and match the case with chargeback reason.
Provide mentorship, guidance and career development to direct reportees and members of their team. Lead a high-performing team through an exciting transition to build problem solving, critical thinking, analytical and technical capabilities which will enable the department to develop deeper, more scalable solutions
Establish team goals and work with direct reports on strategies for executing, measuring progress and sharing results. Deliver projects involving quantitative analysis, industry research, and strategy development, working directly with global cross-functional teams to problem solve analytical approaches and develop solutions
Identify actionable insights, suggest recommendations, and influence team strategy through effective communication
Protect Clients ecosystem, prevent fraudulent activity, enforce our TOS and policies, ensuring compliance across a global user base of millions
Drive Managers and Operations teams to deliver value adds, continuous improvements, and productivity/quality gains.
Streategize and execute Client/Leadership directions and decisions following the change management process.
Mantain an effective Client relationship with proactive communication followed by POA and closed loop

On our Geoscience and Petrotechnical teams, proven expertise and intelligent tech meet, powering our legacy and future of subsurface solutions. Whether in the field or our learning centers, your unique skills and understanding of hydrocarbons will help solve the toughest challenges for clients every day. And with a start at SLB, you'll be set up for a bright future making a real impact across our business and industry.

As a Geologist, you will combine your understanding of earth sciences with a comprehensive knowledge of the latest logging technologies to determine reservoir architecture and hydrocarbon potential. You will become adept at multiple software systems and work closely with customers to find innovative ways to solve some of their most complex challenges.

As one of our Geophysicists, you will apply your knowledge and expertise of the earth's properties to enhance interpretations of geological data and greater define how we understand the subsurface. We acquire huge amounts of often previously unseen seismic and geophysical data around the world and you will help transform it into the knowledge that powers better decision-making and more effective, more efficient services. You will be involved in the acquisition, processing and interpretation of that data and we offer a range of career opportunities to develop your skills and get exposure across the data lifecycle.

As a Petrophysicist, you will combine logging data from multiple downhole sensors with sample data to determine hydrocarbon production capacity, lithology and fluid saturation of the reservoir to ultimately help us optimize its production. You will incorporate data from multiple wells and additional sensors to consider acoustics, spectroscopy and magnetic resonance to enhance overall accuracy or build a clearer picture of the reservoir by understanding its permeability and mechanical properties.

As a Reservoir Engineer, you will use data and our leading software products and solutions to create reservoir models that help clients make decisions that deliver safer, optimized, long-term production for each reservoir by simulating fluid flow phase behavior and reservoir physical properties.

As a Production Optimization Engineer, you will deliver performance improvements to our clients' assets worldwide though virtual representations of our downhole products which incorporate calculations, finite element analysis (FEA), computation fluid dynamics (CFD), costing and parametric modeling into one cohesive system.

Requirements


Meet minimum degree requirements
Technically curious and determined to improve approaches and methods of discovery
Ambitious and looking to take on responsibility
Able to effectively contribute to a team
Good written and verbal communication
Focused on quality

Full_Description:
Job Description:                                                                                                                      

บริหารจัดการทรัพย์สินไอทีทั้งหมด เช่น คอมพิวเตอร์ อุปกรณ์ต่อพ่วง ซอฟต์แวร์ และอุปกรณ์เครือข่าย

ดำเนินการเบิก–จ่ายอุปกรณ์ไอทีให้ผู้ใช้งาน พร้อมบันทึกประวัติการใช้งานในระบบ

ติดต่อประสานงานกับหน่วยงานที่เกี่ยวข้อง

Qualification:

ปฏิบัติงาน จ-ศ (WFH วันเสาร์)

About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Product Operations Officer to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will support our VP Marketing. While VP Marketing focuses on market strategy and front-facing sales enablement, you will be the engine that drives the execution—coordinating with global Vendors and local SI to ensure every project reaches the finish line.




Key Responsibilities

Support the VP Marketing in managing day-to-day operations across assigned cybersecurity products.

Coordinate with internal teams, SI partners, and vendors to follow up on ongoing deals and projects.

Follow up on project progress after the initial proposal phase, ensuring all documentation and internal processes are completed.

Assist in preparing quotations, proposals, and related documentation.

Liaise with vendors for order processing, pricing, and delivery timelines.

Ensure accurate and timely order fulfillment from vendor to SI.

Maintain and update sales pipeline, reports, and forecasts.

Support marketing activities such as events, campaigns, and product promotions.

Help organize product training sessions and partner enablement activities.




Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, IT, or related fields.

1–3 years of experience in IT, distribution, or coordination roles (fresh graduates with strong potential are welcome).

Strong organizational and multitasking skills.

Good communication skills in English (written and spoken).

Detail-oriented with a strong sense of ownership.

Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Familiarity with sales processes or project-based selling.

Experience in IT distribution, SI, or cybersecurity products will be an advantage.

Data Quality Analyst

Job Summary: We are seeking for a Data Quality Analyst to ensure reliability, accuracy, and consistency of datasets used for Artificial Intelligence training and business intelligence systems. The role focuses on auditing datasets, identifying anomalies, resolving inconsistencies, and maintaining high-quality data standards. You will assess dataset completeness, labeling accuracy, formatting consistency, and compliance with project guidelines. This role is essential in preventing model bias, improving prediction reliability, and maintaining trustworthy AI systems.

Key Responsibilities

·        Audit datasets for quality and consistency.

·        Identify data errors and anomalies.

·        Validate annotations and labeling accuracy.

·        Develop data quality checks and validation rules.

·        Monitor dataset integrity across projects.

Job Requirements

·        Bachelor’s Degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field.

·        Must possess a Data validation and auditing skills.

·        Knowledge of data governance concepts.

·        Data Quality Management Certification (advantage)

·        Must be certified as a Google Data Analytics Certification or Microsoft Data Fundamentals, Data Governance or Data Management Certification (optional)

·        3-5 years’ experience in data quality, analytics, or data operations.

Job_Title: Junior IT Support (Open to Fresh Grads)
Full_Description:
ABOUT THE JOB

Provide Level 1 IT support to internal users (hardware, software, network, and access-related issues).

Manage and track incidents and service requests through JIRA Helpdesk or similar ticketing systems.

Diagnose and troubleshoot issues related to Windows OS, Microsoft Office, email, VPN, and network connectivity.

Support user account management (password resets, access rights, onboarding/offboarding processes).

Escalate complex technical issues to Level 2/3 teams when necessary.

Maintain documentation of incidents, solutions, and IT procedures.

Assist in IT asset management and inventory tracking.

Contribute to continuous improvement of IT support processes and service quality.

ABOUT YOU

Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.

0–2 years of experience in IT Support or Helpdesk roles.

Hands-on experience with JIRA Helpdesk or similar ticketing tools.

Basic understanding of network fundamentals, Active Directory, and hardware troubleshooting.

Familiarity with Microsoft 365 environment.

Good communication skills and service-oriented mindset.

Ability to work in a fast-paced and multicultural environment.

Professional proficiency in English (mandatory).

WHY AMARIS?

At Amaris Consulting, we believe in creating a thriving, positive workplace where every team member can grow, connect, and make a real impact. Here’s what you can expect when you join our dynamic community:

Global Diversity: Be part of an international team of 110+ nationalities, celebrating diverse perspectives and collaboration.

Trust and Growth: With 70% of our leaders starting at entry-level, we’re committed to nurturing talent and empowering you to reach new heights.

Continuous Learning: Unlock your full potential with our internal Academy and over 250 training modules designed for your professional growth.

Vibrant Culture: Enjoy a workplace where energy, fun, and camaraderie come together through afterworks, networking events, and more.

Meaningful Impact: Join us in making a difference through our CSR initiatives, including the WeCare Together program, and be part of something bigger.

Equal Opportunity

Amaris Consulting is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to promoting diversity within the workforce and creating an inclusive working environment. For this purpose, we welcome applications from all qualified candidates regardless of gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, beliefs, age, marital status, disability, or other characteristics.

Job_Title: เจ้าหน้าที่ It Support
Full_Description:
หน้าที่ความรับผิดชอบ:

1.ดูแลและบำรุงรักษา: ตรวจสอบและซ่อมแซมอุปกรณ์คอมพิวเตอร์ (Hardware), อุปกรณ์ต่อพ่วง (Printer, Scanner) และระบบเครือข่ายพื้นฐานภายในองค์กร

2.ติดตั้งและอัปเดต: ติดตั้งระบบปฏิบัติการ (Windows/macOS), ซอฟต์แวร์พื้นฐาน และโปรแกรมเฉพาะทางให้พร้อมใช้งานเสมอ

3.แก้ไขปัญหาทางเทคนิค (Helpdesk): รับเรื่องและแก้ไขปัญหาการใช้งานคอมพิวเตอร์ให้กับพนักงานในองค์กร ทั้งแบบ On-site และ Remote

4.จัดการระบบเครือข่าย: ดูแลระบบ LAN, Wi-Fi และระบบ Internet ให้เสถียร รวมถึงการตั้งค่า User Account ต่างๆ

5.ความปลอดภัยข้อมูล: ดูแลระบบ Anti-virus, การสำรองข้อมูล (Backup) และให้คำแนะนำเรื่องความปลอดภัยไซเบอร์เบื้องต้น

6.บริหารจัดการทรัพย์สิน: จัดทำทะเบียนประวัติอุปกรณ์ IT (IT Inventory) และประสานงานกับ Supplier ในการสั่งซื้อหรือส่งซ่อมอุปกรณ์

7.ดูแลบริหารจัดการ ระบบ Cloud System

-บริหารจัดการบัญชีผู้ใช้งาน (Create/Update/Delete) และกำหนดสิทธิ์การเข้าถึงข้อมูลบนระบบ Cloud ของบริษัท (เช่น Microsoft 365 Admin Center, Google Workspace หรือ AWS)

- ดูแลการจัดเก็บข้อมูลและการแชร์ไฟล์ผ่านระบบ Cloud (เช่น OneDrive, Google Drive, SharePoint) ให้เป็นระเบียบและปลอดภัย

-ให้คำแนะนำและแก้ไขปัญหาการใช้งานแอปพลิเคชันรูปแบบ SaaS (Software as a Service) ที่บริษัทใช้

-ตรวจสอบและดำเนินการสำรองข้อมูลบนระบบ Cloud (Cloud Backup) เพื่อป้องกันข้อมูลสูญหายและสามารถกู้คืนได้ทันทีเมื่อเกิดปัญหา

-ตรวจสอบความปลอดภัยเบื้องต้น เช่น การตั้งค่า MFA (Multi-Factor Authentication) และตรวจสอบการล็อกอินที่ผิดปกติ

8.งานธุรการและงานอื่นๆตามที่ได้รับมอบหมาย




คุณสมบัติ:

*วุฒิการศึกษา: ปริญญาตรี สาขาคอมพิวเตอร์ธุรกิจ, วิทยาการคอมพิวเตอร์, วิศวกรรมคอมพิวเตอร์ หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

*มีประสบการณ์ในสายงานไม่น้อยกว่า 5 ปี

*ทักษะทางเทคนิค:

-มีความเชี่ยวชาญในการติดตั้งและแก้ปัญหา Windows 10/11 และ Microsoft 365

-มีความรู้ความเข้าใจด้าน Network (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VLAN)

-หากมีประสบการณ์ด้าน Windows Server หรือระบบ Firewall จะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

*ทักษะด้านบริการ (Soft Skills):

-มีใจรักบริการ (Service Mind) และมีความใจเย็นในการสื่อสารกับผู้ใช้งานที่ไม่เก่งเทคโนโลยี

-สามารถลำดับความสำคัญของปัญหาได้ดี (Prioritization)

-ใฝ่เรียนรู้เทคโนโลยีใหม่ๆ อยู่เสมอ

*ประสบการณ์: มีประสบการณ์การทำงานในสายงาน IT Support อย่างน้อย 1-2 ปี (หรือยินดีรับเด็กจบใหม่ที่มีความกระตือรือร้น)

*มีประสบการณ์หรือความเข้าใจในการบริหารจัดการระบบ Cloud พื้นฐาน Microsoft 365, Google Workspace

*มีเข้าใจความเชื่อมโยงระหว่างระบบ Network ภายใน (On-premise) กับระบบ Cloud

*มีความรู้เรื่องความปลอดภัยบน Cloud เช่น การจัดการสิทธิ์ (IAM), การตั้งค่ารหัสผ่าน และการป้องกัน Phishing

*สามารถเรียนรู้และอัปเดตฟีเจอร์ใหม่ๆ ของระบบ Cloud ที่มีการเปลี่ยนแปลงตลอดเวลาได้

Company: ผู้ประกอบการไม่เปิดเผยชื่อบริษัท
Full_Description:
IT Support Specialist, Asia-Pacific
Location: Bangkok, Thailand
Contract type: Full-time
Reports to: Senior Service Desk Manager / IT Operations Manager

About the role

We are seeking a capable and service-oriented IT Officer to provide day-to-day operational and help desk support to our Asia-Pacific team, including both corporate staff and project associates. Based in Bangkok, this role will serve as a key first point of contact for user support across the region, ensuring staff can work effectively, securely and with minimal disruption.

The role requires a strong blend of hands-on technical troubleshooting capability, sound judgement, and clear English communication skills, as the postholder will support a diverse regional user base across different countries, teams and levels of technical confidence.

This is a practical, delivery-focused role suited to someone who is responsive, organised, technically competent, and comfortable operating in a fast-paced professional environment.

What success looks like in the role

The successful candidate will ensure that Asia-Pacific staff and associates receive timely, reliable and professional IT support, that regional users can work productively with minimal disruption, and that core IT systems, devices and support processes are managed in a secure, organised and dependable manner.

Roles and Responsibilities

The IT Officer will be responsible for:

Providing first-line and second-line IT support to staff and project personnel across the Asia-Pacific region

Acting as the primary help desk contact for day-to-day user issues relating to laptops, desktops, printers, mobile devices, peripherals, connectivity, user accounts and standard business software

Providing user support across both Windows and Mac devices, including device setup, configuration, troubleshooting and routine maintenance

Supporting users with Microsoft 365 applications, including Outlook, Teams, OneDrive, SharePoint, Word, Excel and PowerPoint

Troubleshooting issues relating to Windows environments, remote access, VPN, email access, file sharing, software installations and device performance

Setting up and configuring laptops, user accounts, access permissions and standard applications for new starters, and supporting offboarding and equipment recovery for departing personnel

Supporting a transitioning device environment as the organisation gradually expands its use of MacBooks and macOS alongside its existing Microsoft-based systems

Maintaining accurate records of IT assets, licenses, user accounts, warranties and support logs

Liaising with external vendors, service providers and building management as required on internet, telephony, hardware repair, procurement and related IT matters

Supporting the maintenance and reliability of office IT infrastructure, including Wi-Fi, meeting room technology, printers and shared devices

Escalating more complex technical issues appropriately and following through to resolution

Supporting good cybersecurity practice, including password hygiene, device compliance, patching, antivirus, access control and user awareness

Assisting with IT procurement, basic budgeting inputs, and sourcing of hardware or services in line with company procedures

Contributing to the continuous improvement of IT processes, user guidance materials and service quality across the regional platform

Qualifications and experience

Essential

Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Information Systems or a related field. A Masters degree is an advantage.

At least 3–6 years’ relevant experience in an IT support, help desk, end-user support or IT operations role

Practical experience supporting both Windows and macOS end-user environments, or strong capability and willingness to support a growing Mac estate within a predominantly Microsoft ecosystem

Familiarity with integrating macOS devices into Microsoft 365-based working environments, including Outlook, Teams, OneDrive and SharePoint

Experience in troubleshooting common hardware, software, network and user access issues

Experience supporting users in a professional office environment with a strong customer service focus

High level of written and spoken English, equivalent to IELTS 7.0 and the ability to explain technical issues clearly and professionally to non-technical users

Excellent organisational skills, with the ability to manage multiple requests and prioritise effectively

High attention to detail and a disciplined approach to documentation and follow-up

Thai national, or otherwise already holding the legal right to live and work in Thailand

Desirable

Experience supporting regional or multi-country teams

Experience in an international company, professional services environment, INGO, donor-funded programme or consultancy setting

Familiarity with identity and access management, device management, endpoint security, backup processes and IT asset control

Experience coordinating with third-party vendors and service providers in Thailand

Relevant technical certifications such as CompTIA A+, Network+, Microsoft, ITIL, or similar

Basic familiarity with networking concepts, cybersecurity controls and cloud-based collaboration environments

Experience supporting hybrid working arrangements and remote users across time zones

Personal attributes

We are looking for someone who is:

Practical and solutions-focused

Service-oriented and responsive

Professional and trustworthy, with good judgement

Able to work independently while knowing when to escalate

Comfortable engaging with colleagues from different cultures, functions and levels of seniority

Proactive in identifying issues and improving systems and processes

About us

We are an award-winning global advisory company. We work locally to transform lives by making economies stronger, societies more stable, and governments more effective. Our clients are governments, international organisations, companies, and foundations. They come to us to develop strategies and to design, deliver and evaluate programs that address the big challenges facing the world.

As a company with experience delivering lasting results, including in fragile states and where there is conflict, we are prepared to manage a high level of risk to achieve our purpose. For three decades, in over 100 countries, we have worked in partnership with governments, the private sector and civil society at all stages of the development cycle.

Our core team of staff and technical experts, in offices around the world, ensures the quality of delivery and high ethical standards that we and our clients require. We bring together a global network of specialist experts, who contribute their experience and know-how, where and when it is needed.

Our company is owned and operated by its employees. We are committed to corporate integrity and a triple bottom line of social, environmental and financial performance. That is the way we work, and that commitment was formally recognised when we became a certified B Corp. The certification indicates we balance profit and purpose through the highest standards of transparency and accountability as well as social and environmental performance.

We are also a participant in the UN Global Compact, which certifies our respect for standards of human rights, labour, environment, and anti-corruption. By sharing our knowledge and experience, we help to improve learning in our industry, as well as the positive impact we can have on people’s lives. We are strategic, operational, and on a mission to take on global challenges.

#WeAreIn for driving decarbonization and digitalization.

Job_Title: เจ้าหน้าที่ฝ่ายงานระบบและจัดการธุรกิจหลังการขาย
Full_Description:
Responsibilities

Main Responsibility Summary
You will be responsible for the end-to-end administration of the service coupon system and marketing campaign configurations. This role ensures that dealers nationwide receive accurate subsidies and that all after-sales campaigns are executed effectively through data-driven systems.

1. System Setup: Establish and maintain the Campaign Master, Maintenance Tables, and Subsidy Tables for service coupons.
2. Subsidy Management: Perform detailed assessments of subsidies for Service Coupons and Marketing Campaigns for the nationwide dealer network.
3. Requirement Gathering: Coordinate with relevant teams to gather business requirements and configure the Campaign Master for various Marketing initiatives.
4. Data Analysis: Use appropriate analytical tools to monitor and analyze the usage of Service Coupons, Claims, and Marketing Campaigns to provide actionable insights.

Qualifications

1. Bachelor's degree in Business Administration or related field
2. 0-3 years experience (Fresh graduates are welcome)

This is a full-time teaching position in our Technology department. The teacher will be responsible for instructing students according to the set curricular standards while fostering a safe and supportive learning environment rooted in the love of Jesus for all children. Other duties include, but are not limited to:
-Leading Chapel or SEL lessons
-Supervising students in various contexts
-Attending and contributing to departmental and whole-school meetings
-Collaborating on a variety of school improvement initiatives
-Corresponding with parents, colleagues, and administration
-Engaging in regular professional development opportunities


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

● Design, develop, and facilitate safe and meaningful learning experiences for students

that promote respect for all.

● Teach specific grade level subject matter to a diverse student population, following the

Computer Science Teachers Association (CSTA) standards.

● Submit timely unit plans and lesson plans for classes assigned within the semester

● Employ a variety of formative and summative assessments that are purposeful and

appropriate for the content and student population

● Help the students achieve the learning objectives by providing constructive feedback

based on formative and summative assessments

● Collaborate and communicate effectively with students, parents, fellow staff, and other

stakeholders in ways that can further enhance student learning

● Co-develop the technology curriculum along with the Head of Technology and

Technology Specialist.

● Co-facilitate the robotics teams along with a team of robotics coaches.

● Coordinate with principals, division heads, and Head of Technology to ensure tasks are

completed and evaluated.


JOB REQUIREMENTS

● Candidate possesses a Bachelor's Degree or Professional Degree, in Computer

Science/ Computing/ Information Technology/Instructional Design/Educational

Technology/Design Technology or equivalent. Candidates with a degree in allied fields

such as Mathematics, Engineering and Science will be considered as well. A master's

degree is a plus.

● At least 1 year of working experience in teaching

● Certifications are a plus (Google Certified Educator, Microsoft Innovative Educator, Apple

Teacher, etc.)

● Willingness to grow professionally and to contribute to the team and school leadership

COMPETENCIES (KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS & ABILITIES)

● Good analytical, interpersonal and communication skills

● Prior knowledge in computer programming and educational robotics is an advantage

● Proficiency in software applications related to graphic design and web development

● Individual with a can-do attitude, willing to learn, team player, and result driven.

● Commitment to ensuring academic success for all students

● Fluent in English language, both oral and written

Compensation
-Starting salary of around ฿530,000-฿800,000+. Salary increases according to and depending on type(s) of degree(s), teaching certification, pre-ICSN experience, and years of experience at ICSN.
-Annual benefits include airfare stipend, housing stipend, quality health insurance (for employee and dependents), provident fund, and more.
-For families, benefits also include monthly child stipend and free tuition.

Company: Advanced Info Service Public Company Limited (AIS)
Full_Description:
Identify, prioritize, and track the remediation of vulnerabilities across our global infrastructure before they can be exploited. You will own the transition from periodic scanning to Continuous Threat Exposure Management (CTEM), managing our Bug Bounty programs and orchestrating our vulnerability response at scale.




Role & Responsibility

• Attack Surface Management (ASM):

Map and monitor the entire external digital footprint, including "Shadow IT," forgotten cloud buckets, and sub-domains.

Implement automated tools to detect changes in the attack surface in real-time.




• Threat & Vulnerability Management (TVM):

Own the end-to-end vulnerability lifecycle: Discovery -> Prioritization -> Tracking -> Validation.

Move beyond "CVSS scores" by using Risk-Based Prioritization (e.g., EPSS, CISA KEV) to focus on vulnerabilities that are actually being exploited in the wild.

Lead Vulnerability Management to ensure SLAs for issue fixing.




• Bug Bounty & Offensive Testing:

Act as the primary architect and manager of the Bug Bounty Program.

Triaging incoming reports, validating " proof of concepts," and ensuring researchers are rewarded fairly and promptly.

Perform targeted "Purple Team" exercises to test our SOC's detection capabilities against specific threat actor TTPs (Tactics, Techniques, and Procedures).




Qualification

• Bachelor’s degree or higher in computer science, information technology, Cyber Security or related field

• 3-5 years' experience in Cyber Security, IT Infrastructure and dedicated Offensive Security or Pentesting role

• Experience with Attack Surface tools, managing a public or private bug bounty program, Mastery of tools like Burp Suite, Metasploit, Nmap, and automated scanners

• Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH) or OSCP or equivalent certifications will be advantage

• Good analytical abilities, Project Management, Communication skills

Key Responsibilities

Act as a central point of contact for project communications—ensuring clarity and consistency across internal teams and external partners.

Track and report on project progress, risks, issues, and dependencies, escalating as needed to ensure timely resolution.

Support project tooling and systems, such as JIRA, Confluence, or other task management and documentation platforms.

Assist in preparing high-quality status reports, presentations, and summaries for internal reviews and client meetings.




QUALIFICATIONS

Bachelor’s degree in IT, Business, or a related field.

2–3 years of relevant experience in digital, IT, or web project management.

Strong understanding of digital or IT-related project workflows.

Strong understanding of project management tools and delivery methodologies.

Excellent communication, coordination, and documentation skills.

Ability to manage multiple priorities and maintain momentum in fast-paced environments.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills in Thai and English.

Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, team-oriented environment.

Self-driven, detail-oriented, and solutions-focused.




BENEFITS

Monday to Friday work schedule

Annual salary review based on performance

Annual bonus based on personal performance

Computer provided

The Networking Managed Services Engineer (L1) is an entry level engineering role, responsible for providing a managed service to clients to ensure that their IT infrastructure and systems remain operational through proactively identifying, investigating, and resolving technical incidents and problems and restoring service to clients by managing incidents to resolution.

This role has the primary objective is to ensure zero missed service level agreement (SLA) conditions and focuses on first-line support for standard and low complexity incidents and service requests.

This role may also contribute to / support on project work as and when required.

What you'll be doing

Key Responsibilities:

Monitors client infrastructure and solutions.
Identifies problems and errors prior to or when they occur.
Routinely identifies common incidents and opportunities for avoidance as well as general opportunities for incident reduction.
Investigates first line incidents assigned and identifies the root cause of incidents and problems.
Fulfils approved requests following agreed procedures.
Provides telephonic or chat support to clients when required.
Executes approved maintenance activities including patching and configuration changes.
Follows the required handover procedures for shift changes to ensure service continuity.
Reports and escalates incidents where necessary.
Ensures the efficient and comprehensive resolutions of incidents and requests.
Proactively identifies opportunities for work optimization.
Updates existing knowledge articles or creates new ones.
Identifies opportunities for work optimization including opportunities for automation of work, request fulfilment, incident resolution, and other general process improvement opportunities.
May also contribute to / support on project work as and when required.
May work on implementing and delivering Disaster Recovery functions and tests.
Performs any other related task as required.


Knowledge and Attributes:

Ability to communicate and work across different cultures and social groups.
Ability to plan activities and projects well in advance, and takes into account possible changing circumstances.
Ability to maintain a positive outlook at work.
Ability to work well in a pressurized environment.
Ability to work hard and put in longer hours when it is necessary.
Ability to apply active listening techniques such as paraphrasing the message to confirm understanding, probing for further relevant information, and refraining from interrupting.
Ability to adapt to changing circumstances.
Ability to place clients at the forefront of all interactions, understanding their requirements, and creating a positive client experience throughout the total client journey.
Additional skills proficiency such as (but not limited to):
Pulse Secure SSL VPN / Virtual Juniper, Palo Alto, Fortinet Firewalls / Cisco Nexus switches, ASR and ISR routers / Cisco ACS, ISE / Meraki switches and access points / Enterprise network architecture / Common routing protocols: BGP,OSPF, EIGRP / Network address translation / Configuring, monitoring and troubleshooting uplinks to ISPs for DIA, MPLS and P2P circuits / Familiarity with common network management and monitoring tools such as SecureCRT, Logic Monitor.


Academic Qualifications and Certifications:

Bachelor's degree or equivalent qualification in Information Technology/Computing (or demonstrated equivalent work experience).
CCNA or equivalent certification.
Certifications relevant to the services provided (certifications carry additional weightage on a candidate’s qualification for the role).


Required Experience:

Entry-level experience or completion of the relevant intern program.
Entry-level experience with troubleshooting and providing the support required in network / data center / systems / storage administration and monitoring Services within a medium to large ICT organization.
Basic knowledge of management agents, redundancy concepts, and products within the supported technical domain (i.e. Network, Data Centre, Telephony, Exchange, Storage, Cloud, Backup, etc.).

Workplace type:

On-site Working

About the Company 

At Omise, we believe the digitalization of the economy has opened up the world and offers endless opportunities to grow and make meaningful connections with one another. Omise connects people, businesses and society in innovative ways to provide fair and open access to a growing economic ecosystem under its vision of enabling access to the digital economy for everyone. We are on a mission to make digital finance seamless and borderless for people and businesses. Our solutions are used by thousands of companies worldwide including Toyota, ByteDance, ICBC, Siam Commercial Bank, True Money, Worldline, Allianz, Bank of Ayudhya, McDonald’s, BMW, King Power and Pomelo. 

As a value-driven organization, we are committed to selecting and retaining the sharpest minds across all functions. Join us in our global efforts to make digital finance seamless and borderless for people and businesses.

About the Team 

Omise Engineering teams have a strong focus on innovation and staying at the forefront of technological advancements. This involves a commitment to continuous learning and experimentation with new tools and methodologies. We foster a collaborative environment where team members can openly communicate and share ideas. Omise engineering follows agile methodologies i.e. iterative development process, frequent feedback, and adaptability to changes, allowing teams to respond quickly to evolving requirements. We promote a sense of ownership and accountability and a healthy work-life balance.

Why we need you

We are looking for an experienced Database Administrator who has a strong understanding of PostgreSQL database management on AWS cloud infrastructure, while also working with NoSQL solutions like MongoDB, DocumentDB, and DynamoDB. The role will lead database operations, including implementing database lifecycle operations, backup and recovery strategies, performance optimization, and mentoring junior team members as well as managing infrastructure-as-code using Kubernetes and Terraform.

You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to support application scaling, evaluate emerging database technologies, and ensure data models align with business requirements while maintaining security standards (PCI DSS) and compliance for payment systems.

What you will be doing

Lead the DBA team in responding to database-related alerts & escalation, as well as working with other teams to come up with strategic solutions to recurring problems
Lead and mentor junior database administrators, providing technical guidance and critical decision-making support
Responsible for implementing, managing, and optimizing high-availability PostgreSQL databases on AWS cloud infrastructure
Design, implement, and verify database backup and recovery strategies, ensuring data integrity and business continuity
Execute and manage database lifecycle operations including creatings, configurations, upgrades, and migrations
Monitor database performance proactively and implement optimization strategies
Responsible for capacity planning and develop long-term database infrastructure strategies
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (data, development, and architecture) to support application scaling and growth
Create and Maintain comprehensive documentation for database procedures, schemas, and troubleshooting guides
Research and evaluate new databases, technologies, and trends to provide innovative ideas and solutions to improve the existing infrastructure and support new projects and requirements
Ability to review schemas, implement partitioning tables and sharding ,and other changes to improve scalability and performance.
Review proposed software design solutions, providing advice on data models required to support solutions
To be aware of and uphold the security responsibilities as stated in the company's Information Security Policy
Manage infrastructure-as-code using Kubernetes and Terraform
Be part of the on-call rotation to respond to emergencies during off-work hours

You

A minimum of 5 years working experience in Information Technology and Database Administration 
Experience in PostgreSQL database administration
Strong proficiency in English communication (verbal and written)
Able to effectively lead a team
Knowledge of underlying database architecture - schemas/products, database objects, file system structure, tables, views, procedures, functions, triggers, sequences, indexes, and constraints.
Extensive hands-on experience in database management, including: creating and maintaining databases, applying patches and system upgrades, database cloning and migration, advanced troubleshooting, implementing database security measures and performance optimization, and tuning
In-depth knowledge of PostgreSQL concepts including vacuum, logical & physical replication, native partitioning, and sharding
The capability to design, build, and deploy database and application server technology to support software solutions in line with current and future strategy.
Work closely with developers and DevOps supporting Omise codebase to improve SQL queries, joins, and database structure
Strong analytical skills and ability to solve complex issues in a timely manner
Strong teamwork, decision-making, documentation, and analytical skills
Strong experience of working with high availability, scalability environments
Experience in OS system engineering and administration, Linux, Unix, and Windows
Experience in system scripting, such as PERL, PYTHON, Shell, etc
Experience in Kubernetes, Terraform, and Ansible a plus
Autonomous, and with the ability to work independently
Open-minded and eager to learn new things
Comfortable in a rapidly changing environment and working with a fast and agile team
Ability to deal with emergency situations in a calm, efficient, and prompt manner

Nice to Have

Experience with AWS Aurora, including multi-region deployments and Global Database architecture
Advanced PostgreSQL expertise, particularly in replication strategies and native partitioning
NoSQL database management (MongoDB Atlas, AWS DynamoDB, AWS DocumentDB)
Connection pooling optimization, especially with PGBouncer
Database sharding implementation and management
Infrastructure as Code experience using Terraform & Kubernetes
AWS database cost optimization and resource management
Understanding of Ruby on Rails and ActiveRecord ORM
Experience with Datadog for database monitoring, logging, and alert management
Familiarity with PCI DSS compliance requirements in database environments

About Omise

Headquartered in Japan, with operational headquarters in Bangkok and  offices in Singapore, Indonesia, and Malaysia.

Won Digital Startup of the Year at Digital Thailand Big Bang 2017

Life at Omise

Nearly 500 employees work from our six office locations as well as remotely from home or co-working spaces. While we are a global company, a lot of our thinking goes into how to solve payment problems at the hyper-local level to help businesses scale and reach their customers. 

Our core values — simple, real, and beautiful serve as our North Star and are integrated into how we work and the results of our work. 

At Omise, we empower people to embrace project-ownership and take initiative. We love to see our employees act as the owner of the outcome and confidently provide solutions to each challenge, taking a collaborative teamwork approach. Our fellow employees are encouraged to discuss and share ideas, and are given the freedom to explore all areas of their work, in order to achieve the expected results.

People at Omise are from different backgrounds and together, we contribute to creating an inclusive, friendly, and safe working environment. As a company, we embrace diversity and value open discussions, a learning mindset, professionalism, and respect. “Growing with us” means to celebrate the challenges and to always look for opportunities to learn, develop your skills, and move one step forward each day. If this is the work environment you are looking for, then get in touch with us.

We look forward to hearing from you. Omise embraces diversity and nourishes an open and inclusive work environment. We are home to over 27 nationalities and all decisions to hire, promote or discharge are based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs.

We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, genetic information, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other applicable legally protected characteristics.

Excis เป็นผู้นำด้านการสนับสนุนไอทีระดับโลก ขับเคลื่อนด้วยนวัตกรรมและการทำงานร่วมกัน เรากำลังมองหาวิศวกรที่มีความสามารถในด้านสนับสนุนเดสก์ท็อป เพื่อร่วมทีมที่ประเทศไทย หากคุณทำงานได้ดีในสภาพแวดล้อมที่รวดเร็ว และชอบแก้ไขปัญหาทางเทคนิค ตำแหน่งนี้เป็นโอกาสที่สมบูรณ์แบบสำหรับคุณ!

วิศวกรมากกว่า 6,000 คน

ลูกค้าองค์กรใหญ่กว่า 200 แห่ง
